creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
* O. Hartmann (ohartman@zedat.fu-berlin.de) wrote:

I've updated warzone2100 port - it now should no longer segfault
on 10.x, and autorevision changes were merged as well. Could you
please recheck?

If bzr shows up again, you will probably need to add -x to #!/bin/sh
in build_tools/autorevision to trace why bzr is called when it
shouldn't, and send me a full build log.

-- 
Dmitry Marakasov   .   55B5 0596 FF1E 8D84 5F56  9510 D35A 80DD F9D2 F77D
